Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver

Class Backup

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver.Backup
  • public class Backup
extends Object
    Represents a backup of a database table. Contains metadata about the backup including its identifier, status, timestamps, and size.
    Since:
    0.2.25

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  Backup.BackupBuilder

      Creates a new Backup instance.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Backup.BackupBuilder builder()  
      String getBackupId()
      Unique identifier for the backup.
      Instant getCreationTime()
      Timestamp when the backup was created.
      String getDescription()
      Description or human-readable name for the backup.
      Instant getExpiryTime()
      Timestamp when the backup expires (if applicable).
      String getResourceName()
      Name of the table that this backup represents.
      long getSizeInBytes()
      Size of the backup in bytes (if available)
      BackupStatus getStatus()
      Current status of the backup.
      String getVaultId()
      Vault identifier where the backup is stored.

      Unique identifier for the backup.

      Timestamp when the backup was created.

      Description or human-readable name for the backup.

      Timestamp when the backup expires (if applicable).

      Name of the table that this backup represents.

      Size of the backup in bytes (if available)
      void setStatus​(BackupStatus status)
      Current status of the backup.
      void setVaultId​(String vaultId)

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Backup

        public Backup()

      • Backup

        public Backup​(String backupId,
              String resourceName,
              BackupStatus status,
              Instant creationTime,
              Instant expiryTime,
              long sizeInBytes,
              String description,
              String vaultId)
        Creates a new Backup instance.
        Parameters:
        backupId - Unique identifier for the backup. Format and content are provider-specific (e.g., ARN for AWS, snapshot ID for Alibaba).
        resourceName - Name of the table that this backup represents.
        status - Current status of the backup.
        creationTime - Timestamp when the backup was created.
        expiryTime - Timestamp when the backup expires (if applicable). Null if the backup does not have an expiration.
        sizeInBytes - Size of the backup in bytes (if available). -1 if size information is not available.
        description - Description or human-readable name for the backup.
        vaultId - Vault identifier where the backup is stored.
